settings.text: Shop the best nicotine pouch brands in the UK, from everyday favourites like VELO and Nordic Spirit to stronger picks like KILLA and PABLO. Every brand here is authentic, tobacco-free, and chosen for flavour, quality, and consistency.

Shop by Brand

Browse the most popular nicotine pouch brands in one place and jump straight into the collection that fits your taste.
Which Nicotine Pouch Brand Should You Choose?

Different brands suit different styles. VELO is a solid all-rounder with broad flavour coverage, Nordic Spirit is ideal for smoother everyday pouches, KILLA and PABLO lean stronger, while FUMI and XQS tend to appeal to shoppers after modern flavour-led options.
Why Buy Nicotine Pouch Brands from Pouch Lab?

We stock genuine products, rotate in the best flavours, and make it easy to compare strengths, flavour families, and standout brand identities. If you want mint, fruit, berry, citrus, or extra-strong nicotine pouches, this page gives you fast routes into the right collections and products.
Authentic Nicotine Pouches • Fast UK Delivery • Bestselling Brands • Tobacco-Free • VELO • KILLA • Nordic Spirit • FUMI • PABLO • XQS
Popular Nicotine Pouch Brands in the UK

VELO is known for broad flavour variety and dependable quality. KILLA and PABLO are better suited to shoppers looking for stronger nicotine pouches. Nordic Spirit works well for balanced everyday use, while FUMI and XQS bring more modern flavour-first profiles. Explore the carousels above to compare products directly.
